faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the learning curve like?
faq.a1: We've designed the platform to be intuitive. An expert freelancer can be flying in minutes, and a local business owner will be guided step-by-step by our Injected AI Chat, so the curve is minimal.
faq.a2: Tokens are the currency of intelligence. Requests (like writing an email or analyzing metrics) consume very little. With the Growth plan (4M tokens), you'll have plenty of balance for the daily work of up to 5 active projects throughout the month.
faq.q3: How does context injection (Global Brand Strategy) work?
faq.a3: It's our 'state secret'. You train the AI by uploading your style guides, tone, ideal client, and offers. From there, the AI doesn't start 'from zero' on each prompt, but assumes the perfect identity for your brand.
faq.q4: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a4: Yes. You own your account. There are no long-term contracts or tricky commitments. You cancel with a couple of clicks and keep using the account until the end of the monthly billing cycle.
